## ✅ Quality Checklist

<!-- Ensure that all of these points are checked before merging. -->
- [ ] My commit messages strictly follow the Conventional Commits specification (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of the code logic and security standards.
- [ ] I have commented complex logic or hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] Any architectural or workflow changes have been reflected in `.specs/` or `ARCHITECTURE.md`.
- [ ] Zero warnings, type errors, or new linting failures introduced.
- [ ] PR is atomic and focused strictly on the problem statement.
